introSection: Marienkäferbahn is a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently located at Fort Fun Abenteuerland in Wasserfall, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.
fullText:
Marienkäferbahn is a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Zierer currently located at Fort Fun Abenteuerland in Wasserfall, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.



Red track and green supports.
